title: Record: 7-gram N-gram Cache (0.8960 bpb)
body:
## 7-gram N-gram Cache + XSA-All + LeakyReLU² + Parallel Muon

**val_bpb: 0.8960** (3-seed mean, std 0.0004) | **~15.92 MB** | 8×H100 SXM

### Results

| Seed | Pre-cache bpb | **Post-cache bpb** | Cache gain | Eval time | Artifact |
|------|---------------|-------------------|------------|-----------|----------|
| 1337 | 1.1488 | **0.8956** | -0.2532 | 136s | 15,917,799 |
| 42 | 1.1488 | **0.8959** | -0.2529 | 136s | 15,921,427 |
| 2025 | 1.1500 | **0.8966** | -0.2534 | 138s | 15,911,611 |
| **Mean** | **1.1492** | **0.8960** | **-0.2532** | **~137s** | |

### Approach: Streaming 7-gram N-gram Cache at Eval

A single-pass streaming n-gram cache built during sliding window evaluation. For each scored token:

1. **Score** neural model NLL under `torch.inference_mode()`
2. **Cache lookup** across n-gram orders 2-7, with near-zero backoff beta (1e-6) — longest match dominates
3. **Blend** with fixed 80/20 cache/neural mix (alpha=0.20)
4. **Update** cache with scored token's n-grams (score-before-update, single-pass)

No TTT, no online mixer — the cache alone delivers **-0.2532 bpb** over the base model.

### Legality

- ✅ Single-pass, score-before-update (cache updated only after scoring)
- ✅ All eval under `torch.inference_mode()` (no gradients, no weight mutation)
- ✅ No training on validation data
- ✅ No multi-pass replay or phase-2 re-scoring
- ✅ No external downloads — fully self-contained

### Timing

| Phase | Time |
|-------|------|
| Training | 600s (10 min cap) |
| Eval (sliding window + 7-gram cache) | ~137s |
| **Total** | **~737s** |

### Built on

- [PR #549](https://github.com/openai/parameter-golf/pull/549) — LeakyReLU² + Legal TTT + Parallel Muon (base model)
- [PR #741](https://github.com/openai/parameter-golf/pull/741) — N-gram cache inspiration
- [PR #745](https://github.com/openai/parameter-golf/pull/745) — XSA-all, Hedge mixer concepts
- PAQ/cmix compression literature — backoff and blending techniques

See [full README](records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-26_7gram_NgramCache_0.8960/README.md) for ablation, architecture details, and what we tried and discarded.
